rest_license_term-post.description: Configuration for the licenses terms as appear at the License Terms tab, such as its terms of use, restrictions, and perpetual rights.

name.description: The license term name. Mandatory when creating a new license terms.

license_term_type.description: License terms type. Optional types: FREE-TEXT/NUMERIC/LicenseTermsYesNo/LicenseTermsPermittedProhibited/LicenseTermsUOM/LicenseTermsRenewalType Possible values are listed in 'LicenseTermsAndTypes' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API).

controlled_vocabulary_value.description: A list of Controlled Vocabulary values.

items.description: License term type 'Controlled Vocabulary' stored in a mapping table.

value.description: A value in the Controlled Vocabulary table.

license_section.description: License terms section. Optional sections: Terms of Use, Restrictions, Perpetual Rights, Obligations, Termination Obligations, Authorized User Possible values are listed in 'LicenseSections' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API).

order.description: The order of the license term in the section.

otb.description: Setup by the system - true/false. Used to indicate which license term can be edited/deleted by the user.
